title: Tanahu Hydropower Project

resources.title: ADB Tanahu project album
resources.notes: Strong construction and substation imagery, but Flickr pages indicate all-rights-reserved. Good editorial reference, not safe default repo asset.

resources.title: Workers work outside the ongoing construction of the 140MW Tanahun Hydropower Project
resources.notes: Actual construction image. Worth replacing with a licensable equivalent if one exists.

resources.title: PECC1 Tanahu main dam concreting update
resources.notes: Published March 21, 2025 and includes multiple current construction photos from the Tanahu main dam works.

next_step: Search for NEA, contractor, or lender photos with reusable licensing; otherwise keep official figures inline and do not import ADB Flickr images.

title: Dudhkoshi Storage Hydroelectric Project

resources.title: DKJVCL home page with photo gallery and project updates
resources.notes: Official project site clearly advertises a photo gallery. Direct fetch from local shell returned HTTP 406, but web search shows the gallery exists.

resources.title: DKJVCL gallery dam-site image
resources.notes: Direct image endpoint discovered through browser automation on the official gallery page.

resources.title: DKJVCL study report page
resources.notes: High-value technical reference for inline wiki sections and layout descriptions.

resources.title: Dudhkoshi market-sounding teaser PDF
resources.notes: Contains project photos and figures such as land-use mapping. Better suited to inline wiki sections than the top filmstrip.

next_step: Manually access the DKJVCL gallery through browser tooling or web results, identify whether individual images have reusable terms, and extract the best document figures for inline sections.

title: Arun 3

resources.title: SAPDC photo gallery
resources.notes: Best current official photo lead. Public gallery exposes project-faithful dam-site and powerhouse excavation images, but reuse terms still need manual verification before importing.

resources.title: SAPDC monthly progress report up to 28 February 2023
resources.notes: Contains a clean cover-page project schematic that now works well as an inline wiki figure.

resources.title: Arun III HEP project page
resources.notes: Still useful for specifications and status, but the public page surface is mostly text rather than image-rich figures.

next_step: Verify reuse terms on the SAPDC gallery, then replace the weak top-strip placeholder with a true project-work photo instead of generic Arun valley context.

title: Upper Karnali

resources.title: Investment Board Nepal Upper Karnali page
resources.notes: Search indexes still show project metadata and an image placeholder, but the live page currently resolves to a 404 and cannot be treated as a stable figure source.

resources.title: Investment Board Nepal Upper Karnali factsheet page
resources.notes: Indexed as a downloadable factsheet, but the live resource page also resolves to a 404 from direct fetch.

resources.title: GMR Upper Karnali project page
resources.notes: Active official page with project basics, but no durable layout plate or site figure exposed in the public surface.
No clear project-faithful and reusable public photo source identified yet.

next_step: Search environmental and social disclosure packets, lender documents, or archived project brochures for a stable layout or site figure; keep the page image-free rather than falling back to generic Karnali scenery.

title: Uttarganga Storage Hydropower Project

resources.title: NEA transmission annual book 2077
resources.notes: Now converted into clean inline wiki figures, including a project-company page and a page showing the proposed reservoir area.

resources.title: Uttar Ganga Storage Hydroelectric Project EOI document
resources.notes: Still a useful technical lead, but the public PDF endpoint is not reliably retrievable from the shell and has not yet yielded a cleaner plate than the annual-book pages.
No credible project-faithful photo source found in the current public stack.

next_step: Keep mining NEA project-company and EOI material for a cleaner layout drawing, but leave the top strip empty until an actual project-faithful photo source is recovered.
